reviews.comment:
La playera no saludo ni al inicio , ni al final. Llene tanque vacio. No ofrecio limpiar vidrios ni revisar aceite y agua. Le pregunte para inflar las gomas me dijo paga 800 y luego inflas.

(Translated by Google)
The attendant didn't greet me at the beginning or end. I filled the tank, which was empty. He didn't offer to clean the windshield or check the oil and water. When I asked him to inflate the tires, he said, "Pay 800 and then you can inflate them."

reviews.comment:
El que trabaja de seguridad , sabado 12 de julio a la mañana, un desastre, paré a tomar un café y me dijo que no habia ningun lugar para estacionar. Había 5 o 6 lugares libres ,tapados con conos y separadores, y no me habilitó ninguno ni me dió ninguna opción, un vago mal, me fuí a otra estación y se pierden un cliente de años por las pocas ganas de trabajar de ese hombre.

(Translated by Google)
The security guard on Saturday morning, July 12th, was a disaster. I stopped for a coffee and he told me there was nowhere to park. There were 5 or 6 free spaces, covered with cones and dividers, and he didn't allow me to park in any of them or give me any other options. He was incredibly lazy. I went to another station, and they've lost a long-time customer because of that man's lack of motivation.

reviewReply.comment: Buen dia Sebastian, muchas gracias por tu  comentario y calificación, lamentamos mucho la mala experiencia de servicio que obtuviste, te pedimos disculpas,  te esperamos nuevamente en YPF ACA Belgrano.

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tsUVRGcG9ieTAyVURsTVpsVTVhREZMYkZkMVpVRRAB

reviews.comment:
Hacia rato que no iba al ACA Belgrano y ya recordé por qué. Muy mal servicio. El de seguridad que cumple rol de ordenar las filas debería llamarse el "desordenador" nos obligó a ponernos en una fila donde el playero era una tortuga y hablaba con la gente es vez de despachar combustible, le cargo a una moto que se metió,  a otro con un bidón, charlo con un amigo. En fin, tardamos 45 min y teníamos solo 1 auto delante.

(Translated by Google)
It had been a while since I'd been to the ACA Belgrano station, and now I remember why. Terrible service. The security guard, whose job it is to organize the lines, should be called "the disorder-maker." He forced us into a line where the attendant was a snail, chatting with people instead of pumping fuel. He filled up a motorcycle that cut in line, another with a jerrycan, and even talked to a friend. In short, we waited 45 minutes, and there was only one car ahead of us.

reviewReply.comment: Buen dia Veronica, lamentamos mucho la mala experiencia de servicio, estamos trabajando en mejorarla, te pedimos disculpas.
